title: Assignment 1: Search Paradigms
description: Implement complete search with pruning and a greedy solution for the activity selection problem. Submit source files with sample test runs.

title: Assignment 2: Sorting & Searching
description: Implement counting sort, radix sort, and ternary search. Compare empirical runtimes against std::sort on inputs of size 10^5 and 10^6.

title: Assignment 3: Bitmasks & Tries
description: Build a trie supporting insert/search/prefix-count, then solve two bitmask DP problems from the practice set.

title: Assignment 4: String Algorithms
description: Implement the Z-function and a double-hashing scheme for substring matching; report collision rates on the provided test corpus.

title: Assignment 5: Number Theory
description: Implement a linear sieve, modular exponentiation, and modular inverse via extended Euclid. Solve three CSES number theory problems.

title: Assignment 6: Max Flow
description: Implement Ford-Fulkerson with BFS augmenting paths (Edmonds-Karp) and model a bipartite matching problem as a flow network.

title: Assignment 7: Dynamic Programming
description: Solve edit distance, LIS, and the counting tilings problem using bitmask DP. Include state and transition explanations.

title: Assignment 8: Geometry & Backtracking
description: Implement convex hull construction and a backtracking solver for N-Queens. Submit complexity analysis for both.
